tree.name: Jalen Duren
tree.tradeDescription: DET traded a 2025 1st round draft pick (MIL, conditional, became Nolan Traoré) to NYK for Jalen Duren and Kemba Walker. NYK also received a trade exception

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#14)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: DET traded Jerami Grant and Ismael Kamagate to POR for Gabriele Procida, a 2025 1st round pick (MIL, conditional), a 2025 2nd round pick, and a 2026 2nd round pick. Detroit also received a trade exception

assetsGivenUp.name: Jerami Grant
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: DET traded cash to DEN for Jerami Grant and Nikola Radičević. Denver also received a trade exception

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash considerations
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Cash sent to Denver for Jerami Grant

assetsGivenUp.name: Ismael Kamagate
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 46th overall by Detroit (via BKN pick) in the 2022 NBA Draft
